2606.12370.title: Breaking Entropy Bounds: Accelerating RL Training via MTP with Rejection Sampling
2606.12370.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key component in modern large language models, yet the rollout stage remains the key bottleneck in RL training pipelines. Although Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) offers a natural solution to accelerate rollouts through speculative decoding, many studies have observed that MTP acceptance rates degrade significantly during RL training, leading to limited speedup performance. To address this bottleneck, we present Bebop, a systematic study of MTP in LLM post-training, and offer practical recipes to integrate MTP into large-scale RL pipelines. First, we reveal that the MTP acceptance rate is fundamentally bounded by the fluctuation of model entropy, which demonstrates a clear negative linear relationship with the rise of entropy in the RL stage. Second, we show that probabilistic rejection sampling largely alleviates the disturbance introduced by entropy in RL compared to greedy draft sampling. We further identify that the conventional MTP training objectives (cross-entropy or KL) are suboptimal in such settings, and therefore we propose a novel end-to-end TV loss that directly optimizes multi-step rejection sampling acceptance rate, yielding ~10% acceptance rate improvements, achieving up to 95% acceptance rates and up to 25% extra inference throughput gains across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and agentic tasks. Third, we test various online MTP training strategies during RL and show that pre-RL MTP training with e2e TV loss and rejection sampling achieves a consistent acceptance rate and speedup throughout the entire RL, eliminating the need for costly online MTP updating. We provide extensive experiments and analysis that validate our findings. Experimental results show our method achieves up to 1.8x end-to-end acceleration in async RL training of Qwen3.5, Qwen3.6, and Qwen3.7 models.
2606.12370.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）已成為現代大型語言模型的關鍵組成部分，但推出階段仍然是RL訓練管道中的主要瓶頸。雖然多標記預測（MTP）通過推測解碼提供了一種自然的解決方案來加速推出，但許多研究觀察到，在RL訓練過程中，MTP接受率顯著下降，導致速度提升有限。為了解決這一瓶頸，我們提出了Bebop，對LLM後訓練中的MTP進行了系統研究，並提供了將MTP整合到大規模RL管道中的實用方案。首先，我們揭示了MTP接受率從根本上受模型熵波動的限制，並且在RL階段熵的上升與MTP接受率之間存在明顯的負線性關係。其次，我們展示了與貪婪草稿採樣相比，概率拒絕採樣在RL中大大減輕了熵引入的擾動。我們進一步確定，傳統的MTP訓練目標（交叉熵或KL）在這種情況下是次優的，因此我們提出了一種新穎的端到端TV損失，該損失直接優化多步拒絕採樣的接受率，實現約10%的接受率提升，在數學推理、代碼生成和代理任務中達到最高95%的接受率和最多25%的額外推理吞吐量增益。第三，我們在RL過程中測試了各種在線MTP訓練策略，並顯示在整個RL過程中，使用端到端TV損失和拒絕採樣的預RL MTP訓練實現了穩定的接受率和加速，消除了昂貴的在線MTP更新的需求。我們提供了大量實驗和分析來驗證我們的發現。實驗結果顯示，我們的方法在Qwen3.5、Qwen3.6和Qwen3.7模型的異步RL訓練中實現了最高1.8倍的端到端加速。
2606.12370.author: Yucheng Li et.al.
2606.12370.authors: Yucheng Li, Huiqiang Jiang, Yang Xu, Jianxin Yang, Yi Zhang, Yizhong Cao, Yuhao Shen, Fan Zhou, Rui Men, Jianwei Zhang, An Yang, Bowen Yu, Bo Zheng, Fei Huang, Junyang Lin, Dayiheng Liu, Jingren Zhou
